race.description: Every Occasion Catering Country Boosted Bm58 Hcp
race.comment: DUB (1) couldn't quite live up to market expectations fresh but is sure to have come on from that. Has been kept fresh with 39 days in between and gets help under the big weight with the 2kg claimer engaged. Worth another go. ELLOFADUDE (7) has been thereabouts in his two runs back and should be hitting his straps now third-up. Bullock's booking signals stable confidence. Bold showing anticipated. ORSUM (6) got the job done at a big quote last start at Muswellbrook. Strips fitter third-up and is drawn kinder. Deserves a lot more respect this time. MAGURTZ (8) disappointed as favourite when resuming last time but did pull up with excuses. Willing to give another chance but he will need a smart steer from out there.
